## What's Changed

- Reduced cold Tube TV tuning time with two-second HLS segments and an FFmpeg initial read burst.
- Moved playback closer to the live edge while keeping enough client buffering for stable playback.
- Released abandoned channel transcoders after 15 seconds so channel surfing cannot leave hardware encoders competing for resources.
- Fixed idle HLS sessions so stopping playback ends the channel job instead of launching the remaining scheduled media.
- Fixed Tube TV guide cache timestamp normalization when loading an existing schedule.
- Added regression coverage for channel item failures, live playlist windows, and idle-session cleanup.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```
